description: Add task statuses for pending, in progress, and done work.

userStories.title: Adding task status storage
userStories.description: As a user, I want each task to store a status so the app can persist pending, in progress, and done state.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a status field with default 'pending'
Existing tasks resolve to pending on read or migration

userStories.title: Updating task status from actions
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change a task status so I can move work through the workflow.
acceptanceCriteria: Saving a status change persists the new value for the task
Status updates reject invalid status values

userStories.title: Showing task status badges
userStories.description: As a user, I want task cards to show the current status so I can scan work quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Task cards show a badge for pending, in progress, and done
Badge text matches stored task status
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Changing task status in the list
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change status from the task list so I can update work without opening details.
acceptanceCriteria: List view provides a status control for each task
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filtering tasks by status
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter tasks by status so I can focus on specific work states.
acceptanceCriteria: List updates to match the selected status
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
